core_mechanism: reversible, coherence-preserving state transduction between distinct physical carriers acting as an interconnect, enabling distribution of shared correlated (entangled) resources and state-relay (teleportation) across a network of nodes linked by channels
brief_reason: The abstract names as fundamental the 'interconnects that convert quantum states from one physical system to those of another in a reversible fashion,' realized by optical photon-atom coupling that distributes entanglement and teleports states between network nodes.
